name: chart_closure_queue
description: Global provider companion app that shows the logged-in clinician one aged worklist of their own open/unsigned notes that still need to be locked, oldest first, with configurable amber/red aging highlights. Read-only; each row deep-links to the patient chart.

applications.name: Chart-Closure Queue
applications.description: Your open/unsigned notes that still need to be locked, oldest first.

handlers.description: Serves the chart-closure queue modal UI and the provider-scoped open-notes data.
